title: anogramma hispidula
intro: Anogramma hispidula, also known as the Rough Star Fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Anogrammideaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as immune system support and reduced inflammation. Anogramma hispidula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
